name: IELTS Daily v2
description: Complete the IELTS Daily v2 web app — remaining exercise templates, student routes, email/stats, and admin dashboard

userStories.title: Test Framework Setup
userStories.description: As a developer, I want vitest configured so all subsequent stories can include automated tests.
acceptanceCriteria: vitest added as devDependency
vitest.config.ts created with TypeScript support
npm run test script added to package.json
One smoke test exists that imports src/db.ts and verifies DB init works (tables created, topic_queue populated)
npm run build passes
npm run test passes

userStories.title: Short Reading Exercise Template
userStories.description: As a student, I want a dedicated short reading exercise page with a 150-250 word passage and 2 questions.
acceptanceCriteria: src/templates/exercise-short-reading.ts created
Renders passage with title at top (Lora font, justified)
2 questions rendered with correct input types: radio pills for MC, horizontal buttons for T/F/NG, text input for short answer
Submit button disabled until both questions answered
After submission: each question shows check/x with correct answer and 1-sentence explanation
Score displayed as X/2
Back link Volver al tablero at top
Responsive layout, follows specs/design.md
npm run build passes
npm run test passes
userStories.notes: See specs/exercise-2-short-reading.md and specs/design.md for full requirements

userStories.title: Vocabulary Match Exercise Template
userStories.description: As a student, I want an interactive vocabulary matching game to learn new words by connecting them to definitions.
acceptanceCriteria: src/templates/exercise-vocabulary.ts created
Renders 6 words (left) and 6 shuffled definitions (right)
Tap-to-pair vanilla JS: tap word then tap definition to connect with shared color
6 distinct soft accent colors for connected pairs
Tap connected pair to disconnect (undo)
Submit disabled until all 6 pairs connected
After submission: correct green, incorrect red with correct definition + context sentence
Score displayed as X/6
Responsive: stacked on mobile, side-by-side on desktop
npm run build passes
npm run test passes
userStories.notes: See specs/exercise-3-vocabulary.md and specs/design.md. This needs real client-side JS for the matching interaction.

userStories.title: Fill the Gap Exercise Template
userStories.description: As a student, I want a fill-the-gap exercise where I place words into blanks in a paragraph.
acceptanceCriteria: src/templates/exercise-fill-gap.ts created
Paragraph rendered with 5 numbered blanks as underlined interactive slots
7 word chips displayed below in flex-wrap row (5 correct + 2 distractors)
Tap-to-fill vanilla JS: tap blank then tap word chip to fill, chip dims
Tap filled blank to return word to bank
Submit disabled until all 5 blanks filled
After submission: correct fills green, incorrect red with correct word + explanation
Score displayed as X/5
npm run build passes
npm run test passes

userStories.title: Writing Micro Exercise Template
userStories.description: As a student, I want a writing micro exercise where I respond to a prompt in 2-3 sentences with AI feedback.
acceptanceCriteria: src/templates/exercise-writing.ts created
Prompt displayed in styled highlighted box
Textarea with live word counter (X palabras) using vanilla JS
Counter color: gray under 15, green 15-100, orange over 90
Submit enabled only when word count is 15-100
After submission: feedback card with comment, grammar corrections as original to corrected pairs, vocabulary suggestion
Score displayed as X/3
If user writes in Spanish, feedback includes: Intenta responder en ingles
src/templates/practice.ts (old template) deleted
npm run build passes
npm run test passes

userStories.title: Student Routes — Dashboard and Exercise Pages
userStories.description: As a student, I want to navigate from my dashboard to any exercise page and see the correct template rendered.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /s/:token renders dashboard with today's board and exercise cards with correct status
GET /s/:token/exercise/:exerciseId renders correct template based on exercise type
Already-submitted exercises render in read-only feedback mode
Returns 404 for invalid token or exercise ID
Session cookie set on first token URL visit
If no board for today shows Tus ejercicios estan siendo preparados message
npm run build passes
npm run test passes
userStories.notes: This wires dashboard + exercise page rendering. Can handle missing templates gracefully.

userStories.title: Student Routes — Exercise Submission and Grading
userStories.description: As a student, I want to submit exercise answers and receive instant feedback with a score.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /s/:token/exercise/:exerciseId accepts JSON answers, grades, saves submission
Deterministic grading for long_reading, short_reading, vocabulary, fill_gap
AI grading for writing_micro via Claude API (clarity, grammar, vocabulary)
Returns JSON { score, maxScore, feedback } for client-side update
Vocabulary submission adds all 6 words to user word_bank
Prevents duplicate submissions (returns existing feedback)
npm run build passes
npm run test passes
userStories.notes: Depends on exercise templates existing for the POST to make sense, but grading logic is independent.

userStories.title: Student Routes — Stats Page
userStories.description: As a student, I want a statistics page with streak, heatmap, and score history.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /s/:token/stats renders stats page
src/templates/stats.ts rewritten for 21-point daily max
Shows current streak and longest streak
Shows total exercises completed and total boards completed
16-week activity heatmap with 4 intensity levels (0-21 scale)
Recent history: last 20 submissions with date, exercise type, score
Responsive layout, dark mode support
npm run build passes
npm run test passes

userStories.title: Email Template Update
userStories.description: As a student, I want a simple daily email with a link to today's exercises.
acceptanceCriteria: src/templates/email.ts rewritten with simplified template
Subject line: Tu practica de hoy esta lista (fixed)
Body: greeting with name, topic, single CTA button Comenzar linking to /s/:token
Template: white background, max 480px, red #CC0000 button
src/services/email.ts updated: sendInviteEmail accepts topic instead of article title
npm run build passes
npm run test passes

userStories.title: Admin Dashboard Template
userStories.description: As an admin, I want a dashboard to preview exercises, see stats, manage topics, and control the app.
acceptanceCriteria: src/templates/admin.ts created
Today's Edition section: topic, status badge, 5 exercise cards with expandable preview, action buttons
Readership metrics: 4 cards (active users, avg completion, avg score, active streaks)
Users table: name, email, streak, last active, completed today, actions
Email log table: last 30 entries
Settings form: recipients, from_email, cron_schedule, base_url, difficulty dropdown
Topic queue section: list with reorder, add, remove, force-next controls
Clean functional design: Inter font, white background, no newspaper aesthetic
npm run build passes
npm run test passes
userStories.notes: See specs/admin.md for full layout. Desktop-first, no dark mode.

userStories.title: Admin Routes — Full Implementation
userStories.description: As an admin, I want all admin API endpoints working so dashboard actions function.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /admin renders admin dashboard with all data
POST /admin/generate creates today's board with optional topic
POST /admin/regenerate deletes and regenerates board
POST /admin/exercise/:id/regenerate regenerates single exercise
POST /admin/email sends daily email and logs result
POST /admin/settings saves settings
POST /admin/users/add creates user with UUID token
POST /admin/users/:id/remove deletes user and related data
GET /admin/users/:id returns JSON detail
POST /admin/topics/reorder, /add, /remove, /force all work
GET /api/board/today, /api/stats, /api/logs, /api/topics return correct JSON
HTTP Basic Auth on all admin routes
npm run build passes
npm run test passes
